heading: WITHDRAWAL OF MONEY FROM TREASURY; DURATION OF APPROPRIATION
operative_text: No money shall be drawn from the Treasury but in pursuance of specific appropriations made by law; nor shall any appropriation of money be made for a longer term than two years.
cross_refs: Tex. Const. art. VIII, §6 Appendix Note 1
_note: Temporary transition provisions referenced but not included in source text.
